apple.label: Apple
props: Most nutrients (quercetin) are in the skin

pear.label: Pear
props: Soft, grainy texture from stone cells

quality_metrics.texture: Crisp like an apple, juicy like a pear

medlar.label: Medlar
props: Must undergo frost to become edible
Tastes like spiced apple butter or caramel

sloe.label: Sloe (Blackthorn)
props: Used for Sloe Gin or syrups

fresh_jujube.label: Fresh Jujube
props: Used in TCM to calm the mind

lemon.label: Lemon
props: Highly acidic outside, highly alkalizing inside the body

grapefruit.label: Grapefruit
props: WARNING: Interferes heavily with many medications

lime.label: Lime

quality_metrics.flavor: Sharper, more floral acidity than lemon

props: Picked green, turns yellow if fully ripe

mandarin.label: Mandarin / Tangerine
props: Sweeter and less acidic than oranges

pomelo.label: Pomelo
props: Sweet, mild flavor without intense bitterness

blood_orange.label: Blood Orange
props: Requires cold nights to develop red pigments

kumquat.label: Kumquat
props: Peel is sweet, flesh is sour
Massive fiber content because skin is eaten

buddhas_hand.label: Buddha's Hand
props: Used for powerful lemon blossom aroma

cultivated_blueberry.label: Cultivated Blueberry
props: Larger and sweeter than wild blueberries

strawberry.label: Strawberry
props: More Vitamin C per 100g than an orange

gooseberry.label: Gooseberry
props: Berries can be hairy or smooth

cranberry.label: Cranberry
props: Stops bacteria adhering to bladder walls

lingonberry.label: Lingonberry (Cowberry)
props: High levels of natural benzoic acid

sea_buckthorn.label: Sea Buckthorn
props: Vitamin C up to 10x an orange

chokeberry.label: Aronia (Chokeberry)
props: Higher antioxidant capacity than wild blueberry

banana.label: Banana
props: Green bananas contain prebiotic resistant starch

mango.label: Mango
props: The King of Fruits in India

papaya.label: Papaya
props: Black seeds are edible and peppery
Green papaya used in Som Tum
